methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $30M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Valthos operates in Defense & Security at the Seed stage, having raised $30M to date. The broader sector comp universe includes 10 private peers (Anduril, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, Quantum-Systems among them) and 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS), though no peer set meets the narrow filter criteria of same-stage, adjacent-stage, and similar-tier datapoints required for reliable peer-median benchmarking.

Given the constraint on peer comparables, the valuation relies on stage-progression methodology. Using the $30M total raised as a proxy for current valuation, a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical of Seed-to-next-stage progression yields $75M. This single-method triangulation produces a valuation range of $64M (low) to $86M (high), with a median estimate of $75M.

The narrow applicability of peer-median analysis represents the primary limitation here. While 19 same-sector companies exist in the broader dataset, none provided sufficient overlap with Valthos's stage and valuation tier to generate a statistically meaningful median. Material uncertainties around capital efficiency, burn rate, and technology differentiation relative to the identified peer set remain unresolved by this analysis. A credible valuation refinement would require either closer peer-stage alignment or substantive operational metrics (revenue, user growth, customer traction) currently absent from the available data.
